---

## 📊 Review Checklist

### 🔍 Content Review
- [ ] All information is accurate and verifiable
- [ ] Links are working and appropriate
- [ ] Content follows the repository's scope
- [ ] Formatting matches existing style

### 🏗️ Structure Review
- [ ] Table of contents is updated (if needed)
- [ ] Badges and shields are correct
- [ ] File structure follows best practices
- [ ] Metadata is properly formatted

### ⚖️ Compliance Review
- [ ] No unverified conspiracy theories
- [ ] No personal attacks
- [ ] No illegal content
- [ ] Follows code of conduct

### 📝 Documentation
- [ ] README is updated (if needed)
- [ ] AGENTS.md is updated (if adding investigators)
- [ ] CHANGELOG is updated (if applicable)
